context: Tests whether the agent implements the skill's Known Pitfalls guidance: detecting wide-angle recording dedup failure, recommending hash threshold adjustments, handling multi-language transcripts, flagging Whisper hallucination, and detecting non-target speakers in playlist recordings.

checklist.name: Wide-angle detection
checklist.description: The tool detects wide-angle room recordings by comparing the ratio of total extracted frames to unique slides — an unusually low ratio (near 1:1, where almost every frame is treated as 'unique') is the dedup-failure signal: a typical talk shows many frames per slide change so a healthy ratio is well above 1:1, and a ratio close to 1:1 implies perceptual hashing failed to collapse frames of the same slide (typically due to speaker movement in front of the projection)

checklist.name: Hash threshold recommendation
checklist.description: For wide-angle recordings with poor dedup, the tool recommends increasing the hash threshold to 14-18 (or a higher value than the default 8-10), not just reporting the problem

checklist.name: Slide region crop suggestion
checklist.description: For recordings where speaker movement dominates, the tool suggests manually specifying a slide region crop to isolate the projected screen area from the speaker

checklist.name: Multi-language transcript handling
checklist.description: The tool handles transcripts in languages other than the expected language — detects the actual language and does NOT flag a valid non-English transcript as an error when the talk was delivered in that language

checklist.name: Whisper hallucination detection
checklist.description: The tool identifies potential Whisper hallucination by checking for repetitive loops, implausible text patterns, or sections where transcript content doesn't match visible slide text

checklist.name: Transcript source tracking
checklist.description: The diagnostics output distinguishes between transcript sources — YouTube auto-captions vs Whisper transcription vs manual — using a field like 'transcript_source'

checklist.name: Speaker identity verification
checklist.description: The tool checks whether the detected speaker matches the expected speaker and flags mismatches — handling the case where playlist recordings include talks by other presenters

checklist.name: Recording type classification
checklist.description: The tool classifies recordings into at least 3 distinct types (e.g., fullscreen slides, picture-in-picture, wide-angle room) based on extraction metrics, not just pass/fail

checklist.name: Structured diagnostics output
checklist.description: The output is structured JSON with named fields for each diagnostic dimension (recording_type, dedup_quality, transcript_quality, speaker_match, recommendations) — not just prose

checklist.name: Clean recording passes cleanly
checklist.description: For a clean fullscreen recording with good dedup ratio and valid transcript, the tool produces no warnings and classifies it as healthy — it doesn't over-flag
